## Hasil Tabel Pengelompokkan Grup Berdasarkan Pola Keterbelitan 

:::{.r-stack}
:::{.fragment .fade-out}
<table style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.65em; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <thead>
    <!-- Baris Kondisi Utama -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555;">
      <th style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;">Grup</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">Before ($|\psi_1\rangle$)</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f0f4f8;">After ($|\phi_1\rangle$)</th>
    </tr>
    <!-- Baris Pasangan Sudut Parameter -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333; font-size: 0.9em;">
      <th></th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">π/2, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/2</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>

  <tbody style="font-weight: bold;">
    <!-- Grup 1 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 1</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 2 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 2</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 3 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 3</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 4 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 4</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 5 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 5</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 6 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 6</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:20px; font-size:0.55em;">
  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#225ea8;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    ABC (Tripartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#41b6c4;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    C-AB (Bipartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#a1dab4;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    A-BC (Bipartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#e0e0e0;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    A-B-C (Separabel)
  </span>
</div>

:::


:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
<table style="border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;text-align:left;">
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="width:15%;">Grup</th>
<th>Pasangan Parameter $(\alpha_i,\alpha_j)$</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Grup 1</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_6)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 2</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_{12})$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 3</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_{10})$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 4</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_4)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 5</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_8)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 6</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_4)$</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
:::

:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
<table style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.65em; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <thead>
    <!-- Baris Kondisi Utama -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555;">
      <th style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;">Grup</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">Before ($|\psi_2\rangle$)</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f0f4f8;">After ($|\phi_2\rangle$)</th>
    </tr>
    <!-- Baris Pasangan Sudut Parameter -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333; font-size: 0.9em;">
      <th></th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">π/2, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/2</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>

  <tbody style="font-weight: bold;">
    <!-- Grup 1 (Gabungan Eks-Grup 1, 4, dan 5) -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 1</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 2 (Eks-Grup 2) -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 2</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 3 (Eks-Grup 3) -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 3</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 4 (Eks-Grup 6) -->
    <tr style="bordetabelr-bottom: 2px solid #333;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 4</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
:::

:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
<table style="border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;text-align:left;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:0.9em;">
<thead>
<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333;">
<th style="width:15%; padding: 8px 4px;">Grup</th>
<th style="padding: 8px 4px;">Pasangan Parameter $(\alpha_i,\alpha_j)$</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
<td style="padding: 8px 4px; font-weight: bold;">Grup 1</td>
<td style="padding: 8px 4px;">$(\alpha_2,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_6)$</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
<td style="padding: 8px 4px; font-weight: bold;">Grup 2</td>
<td style="padding: 8px 4px;">$(\alpha_2,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_{12})$</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
<td style="padding: 8px 4px; font-weight: bold;">Grup 3</td>
<td style="padding: 8px 4px;">$(\alpha_4,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_{8})$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_{10})$</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333;">
<td style="padding: 8px 4px; font-weight: bold;">Grup 4</td>
<td style="padding: 8px 4px;">$(\alpha_2,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_{8})$</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
:::

:::


---
## Efek Nilai Sudut & Hubungan Trigonometri

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Dampak Sudut Besar ($\pi/2$)**

- Hampir selalu menghasilkan keadaan **separabel penuh** (`A-B-C`).

- Secara matematis, sudut $\pi/2$ memberikan nilai $\cos(\pi/2) = 0$.

- Nilai nol ini **menghapus suku-suku qubit penting** dalam fungsi gelombang, sehingga merusak superposisi.
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Dampak Sudut Kecil ($\pi/12$)**

- Jauh lebih berpotensi membentuk **keterbelitan** (sebagian maupun sejati).

- Nilai $\cos(\pi/12) \approx 0.96$ dan $\sin(\pi/12) \approx 0.25$ membuat kedua nilai trigonometri **sama-sama aktif**.

- Koefisien suku tidak bernilai 0 atau 1, sehingga menjaga kondisi **superposisi kuantum** sebagai syarat perlu keterbelitan.
:::
:::

## Analisis Grup 1 & Grup 2 (Struktur 4 Grup)

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Grup 1 (Generator $\lambda_{10}$ / $\alpha_6$)**

- Mampu menghasilkan keterbelitan sebagian hingga sejati (tripartit `ABC`).

- *Sangat sensitif:* Keterbelitan hanya muncul pada sudut kecil ($\pi/12$ dan $\pi/12$). Kombinasi $\pi/2$ selalu berujung separabel.

- *Catatan:* Pasangan $(\alpha_4, \alpha_6)$ kini melebur sempurna ke grup ini setelah urutan operator dibalik pada $U_{42}U_{24}$.
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Grup 2 (Interaksi $\lambda_2$ - $\lambda_5$)**

- Menunjukkan pergeseran konsisten: **terbelit sebagian** (tahap 1) $\rightarrow$ **terbelit sejati** (tahap 2).

- Muncul secara stabil setiap kali parameter yang terkait dengan generator $\lambda_5$ bernilai $\pi/12$, tanpa memedulikan nilai parameter $\lambda_2$.
:::
:::

## Analisis Grup 3 & Grup 4

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Grup 3 (Kebalikan Grup 2)**

- Pola keterbelitan tripartit `ABC` muncul secara spesifik saat parameter pertama bernilai $\pi/12$.

- Menunjukkan efek **urutan parameter** yang sangat jelas terlihat pada sistem kuantum.
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Grup 4 (Pasangan Sejenis)**

- Berisi pasangan generator sejenis ($\lambda_2$-$\lambda_2$ dan $\lambda_5$-$\lambda_5$).

- *Temuan Penting:* Setelah perbaikan perhitungan pada urutan $U_{42}U_{24}$, grup ini **selalu menghasilkan keadaan separabel penuh (`A-B-C`)** di kedua tahap pengujian.
:::
:::

## Tingkat Invariansi Sudut ($U_{42}U_{24}$ vs $U_{24}U_{42}$)

- Urutan $U_{42}U_{24}$ cenderung menghasilkan tingkat **invariansi sifat keterbelitan yang lebih tinggi/stabil** dibandingkan urutan $U_{24}U_{42}$.


**Bukti Eksplisit pada Keadaan Variasi 7:**

- **Pada Urutan $U_{24}U_{42}$ ($|\phi_1\rangle_7$):** *Sensitif terhadap perubahan.* Ketika sudut dibalik dari $(\pi/12 \text{ \& } \pi/2)$ menjadi $(\pi/2 \text{ \& } \pi/12)$, sifat sistem bergeser dari separabel penuh (`A-B-C`) menjadi terbelit sebagian (`A-BC`).

- **Pada Urutan $U_{42}U_{24}$ ($|\phi_2\rangle_7$):** *Invarian.* Substitusi sudut maupun pembalikannya secara konsisten **bertahan pada keadaan separabel penuh (`A-B-C`)**.

## Mekanisme Pembangkitan Subruang: Keadaan $|\psi_1\rangle_1$ ($U_{24}U_{42}$)

- Transformasi uniter $U_{42} = U_4 \otimes I_2$ bertindak terlebih dahulu pada keadaan dasar $|000\rangle$.
- Transformasi dimensi tinggi hanya membangkitkan subruang qubit $A$ dan $B$, sedangkan qubit $C$ dipertahankan oleh matriks identitas.

$$\left|\psi_1 (\alpha_{2},\alpha_{4})\right\rangle_{1} = \cos \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |000\rangle - \sin \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |010\rangle - \sin \alpha_{4} |100\rangle$$

. . .

Faktorisasi perkalian tensor membuktikan jenis keterbelitan **`C-AB`**:

$$\left|\psi_1 (\alpha_{2},\alpha_{4})\right\rangle_{1} = \left( \cos \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |00\rangle - \sin \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |01\rangle - \sin \alpha_{4} |10\rangle \right)_{AB} \otimes |0\rangle_C$$

## Mekanisme Pembangkitan Subruang: Keadaan $|\psi_2\rangle_1$ ($U_{42}U_{24}$)

- Operator uniter $U_{24} = I_2 \otimes U_4$ diterapkan terlebih dahulu pada keadaan dasar $|000\rangle$.
- Memicu pembangkitan dimensi subruang qubit $B$ dan $C$, sementara qubit $A$ dipertahankan oleh matriks identitas.

$$\left|\psi_2 (\alpha_{2},\alpha_{4})\right\rangle_{1} = \cos \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |000\rangle - \sin \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |001\rangle - \sin \alpha_{4} |010\rangle$$

. . .

Faktorisasi perkalian tensor membuktikan subsistem $A$ terpisah dari subruang $BC$:

$$\left|\psi_2 (\alpha_{2},\alpha_{4})\right\rangle_{1} = |0\rangle_A \otimes \left( \cos \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |00\rangle - \sin \alpha_{2} \cos \alpha_{4} |01\rangle - \sin \alpha_{4} |10\rangle \right)_{BC}$$
